name: ⚠️ IMPORTANT NOTE
description:
⚠️ **IMPORTANT:** Many `get` methods in `StelMovementMgr` are `public` methods, NOT `slots`. They may NOT work reliably in scripts. For reading state, prefer using `core.getStelProperty()` with the documented `Q_PROPERTY` names where available (e.g., `core.getStelProperty('StelMovementMgr.currentFov')`).

For writing state, the `set` methods and action slots (e.g., `setFlagTracking`, `zoomTo`, `lookNorth`) are `public slots` and are safe to use.

compatibility.notes: Read this note before using this module.

name: setFlagTracking
description: Enables or disables tracking of the selected object. When enabled, the camera follows the selected object automatically.

parameters.name: enabled
parameters.description: `true` to enable tracking, `false` to disable.

alternative: Use `core.getStelProperty('StelMovementMgr.tracking')` to read the current state.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and is safe to use.

name: getFlagTracking
description:
⚠️ **WARNING:** This is a `public` method, not a `slot`. It may not work reliably in scripts. Use `core.getStelProperty('StelMovementMgr.tracking')` instead.

Returns whether the view is currently tracking the selected object.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public` method. Its reliability in scripts is not guaranteed.

name: setFlagLockEquPos
description: Locks or unlocks the equatorial position. When locked, the view remains fixed in equatorial coordinates as time passes.

parameters.name: locked
parameters.description: `true` to lock equatorial position, `false` to unlock.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and is safe to use.

name: setEquatorialMount
description: Switches between equatorial mount and alt-azimuthal mount modes. Equatorial mode follows the celestial sphere rotation, while alt-azimuthal mode is fixed to the horizon.

parameters.name: equatorial
parameters.description: `true` for equatorial mount, `false` for alt-azimuthal.

alternative: Use `core.getStelProperty('StelMovementMgr.equatorialMount')` to read the current state.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and is safe to use.

name: getEquatorialMount
description:
⚠️ **WARNING:** This is a `public` method, not a `slot`. It may not work reliably in scripts. Use `core.getStelProperty('StelMovementMgr.equatorialMount')` instead.

Returns whether the mount mode is equatorial (`true`) or alt-azimuthal (`false`).

compatibility.notes: This is a `public` method. Its reliability in scripts is not guaranteed.

example:
// Alternative method (recommended):
var isEquatorial = core.getStelProperty('StelMovementMgr.equatorialMount');

name: toggleMountMode
description: Toggles between equatorial and alt-azimuthal mount modes.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and is safe to use.

example:
// Toggle mount mode
StelMovementMgr.toggleMountMode();

name: setMountMode
description:
Sets the mount mode. Controls the coordinate system used for view movement.
- `0` = Alt-Azimuthal (horizon-based)
- `1` = Equatorial (Equinox Equatorial)
- `2` = Galactic
- `3` = Supergalactic

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: Mount mode (0=AltAz, 1=Equatorial, 2=Galactic, 3=Supergalactic)

compatibility.notes: This is a `public` method, but is safe to use.

name: getMountMode
description:
⚠️ **WARNING:** This is a `public` method, not a `slot`. It may not work reliably in scripts.

Returns the current mount mode.
- `0` = Alt-Azimuthal
- `1` = Equatorial
- `2` = Galactic
- `3` = Supergalactic

compatibility.notes: This is a `public` method. Its reliability in scripts is not guaranteed.

example:
// May not work reliably:
// var mode = StelMovementMgr.getMountMode();

name: setFov
description: Sets the current field of view in degrees instantly (no animation). Values are clamped between `minFov` and `maxFov`.

parameters.name: fov
parameters.description: Field of view in degrees.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public` method, but is safe to use.

name: getCurrentFov
description:
⚠️ **WARNING:** This is a `public` method, not a `slot`. Use `core.getStelProperty('StelMovementMgr.currentFov')` instead.

Returns the current field of view in degrees.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public` method. Its reliability in scripts is not guaranteed.

name: zoomTo
description: Smoothly zooms to a target field of view over a specified duration.

parameters.name: aimFov
parameters.description: Target field of view in degrees.

parameters.name: zoomDuration
parameters.description: Duration of the zoom animation in seconds. Use `0` for an instant change.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and is safe to use.

name: zoomIn
description: Starts or stops continuous zooming in (increasing magnification). Use with a timer for smooth zoom effects.

parameters.name: start
parameters.description: `true` to start zooming in, `false` to stop.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and is safe to use.

name: zoomOut
description: Starts or stops continuous zooming out (decreasing magnification).

parameters.name: start
parameters.description: `true` to start zooming out, `false` to stop.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and is safe to use.

name: autoZoomIn
description: Automatically zooms in on the currently selected object and optionally centers it. This is the action typically bound to the '/' key.

parameters.name: moveDuration
parameters.description: Duration for the zoom animation in seconds.

parameters.name: allowManualZoom
parameters.description: If `true`, allows additional manual zooming beyond the automatic level.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and is safe to use.

name: autoZoomOut
description: Automatically zooms out, either to a satellite system view or to the initial view. This is the action typically bound to the '\\' key.

parameters.name: moveDuration
parameters.description: Duration for the zoom animation in seconds.

parameters.name: full
parameters.description: If `true`, zooms out fully to the initial view even from a satellite view.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and is safe to use.

name: setInitFov
description: Sets the initial field of view value. This will be used when resetting the view.

parameters.name: fov
parameters.description: Initial FOV in degrees.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and is safe to use.

example:
// Set 45° as the default FOV
StelMovementMgr.setInitFov(45.0);

name: setUserMaxFov
description: Sets the user-configured maximum field of view limit. Useful for planetarium domes where FOV should never exceed 180°.

parameters.name: max
parameters.description: Maximum FOV in degrees (1 to 360).

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and is safe to use.

name: setFlagAutoZoomOutResetsDirection
description: Sets whether auto-zoom out should reset the viewing direction to the initial position.

parameters.name: reset
parameters.description: `true` to reset direction on zoom out.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and is safe to use.

example: StelMovementMgr.setFlagAutoZoomOutResetsDirection(true);

name: setFlagEnableMoveAtScreenEdge
description:
⚠️ **WARNING:** This is a `public` method, not a `slot`. It may not work reliably in scripts.

Enables or disables view movement when the mouse cursor reaches the screen edge.

parameters.name: enabled
parameters.description: `true` to enable edge movement.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public` method. Its reliability in scripts is not guaranteed.

example:
// May not work reliably:
// StelMovementMgr.setFlagEnableMoveAtScreenEdge(true);

name: setFlagEnableMouseNavigation
description: Enables or disables mouse dragging for view navigation.

parameters.name: enabled
parameters.description: `true` to enable mouse navigation.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and is safe to use.

example: StelMovementMgr.setFlagEnableMouseNavigation(true);

name: setFlagEnableMouseZooming
description: Enables or disables mouse wheel zooming.

parameters.name: enabled
parameters.description: `true` to enable mouse zooming.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and is safe to use.

example: StelMovementMgr.setFlagEnableMouseZooming(true);

name: setFlagEnableMoveKeys
description: Enables or disables keyboard arrow keys for view movement.

parameters.name: enabled
parameters.description: `true` to enable movement keys.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and is safe to use.

example: StelMovementMgr.setFlagEnableMoveKeys(true);

name: setFlagEnableZoomKeys
description: Enables or disables keyboard zoom keys (PageUp/PageDown).

parameters.name: enabled
parameters.description: `true` to enable zoom keys.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and is safe to use.

example: StelMovementMgr.setFlagEnableZoomKeys(true);

name: setFlagIndicationMountMode
description: Shows or hides the on-screen indicator for the current mount mode.

parameters.name: show
parameters.description: `true` to show indicator, `false` to hide.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and is safe to use.

example: StelMovementMgr.setFlagIndicationMountMode(true);

name: setAutoMoveDuration
description: Sets the duration of automatic movement animations in seconds.

parameters.name: duration
parameters.description: Duration in seconds.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and is safe to use.

name: getAutoMoveDuration
description:
⚠️ **WARNING:** This is a `public` method, not a `slot`. It may not work reliably in scripts.

Returns the duration of automatic movement animations in seconds.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public` method. Its reliability in scripts is not guaranteed.

example:
// May not work reliably:
// var duration = StelMovementMgr.getAutoMoveDuration();

name: setMovementSpeedFactor
description:
⚠️ **WARNING:** This is a `public` method, not a `slot`. It may not work reliably in scripts.

Sets the global movement speed factor. Values >1 speed up movements, <1 slow them down.

parameters.name: factor
parameters.description: Speed multiplier (e.g., 2.0 = twice as fast).

compatibility.notes: This is a `public` method. Its reliability in scripts is not guaranteed.

example:
// May not work reliably:
// StelMovementMgr.setMovementSpeedFactor(2.0);

name: setInitViewDirectionToCurrent
description: Sets the initial viewing direction to the current view direction. The setting is saved to the configuration file.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and is safe to use.

name: resetInitViewPos
description: Resets the view to the initial position and orientation as configured at startup.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and is safe to use.

example:
// Return to the default view
StelMovementMgr.resetInitViewPos();

name: moveToObject
signature: moveToObject(StelObjectP target, float moveDuration, int zooming)
description: Smoothly moves the view to center on a specific celestial object.

parameters.name: target
parameters.description: Target object to center the view on.

parameters.name: moveDuration
parameters.description: Duration of the move animation in seconds.

parameters.name: zooming
parameters.description: Zoom mode: `-1` = Zoom Out, `0` = Zoom None, `1` = Zoom In.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public` method, but is safe to use.

name: moveToJ2000
signature: moveToJ2000(Vec3d aim, Vec3d aimUp, float moveDuration, int zooming)
description: Smoothly moves the view to a specific J2000 equatorial coordinate.

parameters.name: aim
parameters.description: Target J2000 direction vector.

parameters.name: aimUp
parameters.description: Up vector for the target view.

parameters.name: moveDuration
parameters.description: Duration of the animation in seconds.

parameters.name: zooming
parameters.description: Zoom mode: `-1` = Zoom Out, `0` = Zoom None, `1` = Zoom In.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and is safe to use.

name: moveToAltAzi
signature: moveToAltAzi(Vec3d aim, Vec3d aimUp, float moveDuration, int zooming)
description: Smoothly moves the view to a specific Altitude/Azimuth coordinate. **Note:** Only works when the mount mode is Alt-Azimuthal.

parameters.name: aim
parameters.description: Target Alt/Az direction vector.

parameters.name: aimUp
parameters.description: Up vector for the target view.

parameters.name: moveDuration
parameters.description: Duration of the animation in seconds.

parameters.name: zooming
parameters.description: Zoom mode: `-1` = Zoom Out, `0` = Zoom None, `1` = Zoom In.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and is safe to use, but only works in Alt-Azimuth mount mode.

name: panView
description: Pans the view instantly by adding azimuth and altitude offsets to the current direction.

parameters.name: deltaAz
parameters.description: Azimuth change in radians.

parameters.name: deltaAlt
parameters.description: Altitude change in radians.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and is safe to use.

example:
// Pan 10 degrees east and 5 degrees up
StelMovementMgr.panView(10 * Math.PI/180, 5 * Math.PI/180);

name: turnRight
description: Starts or stops continuous panning to the right (east direction).

parameters.name: start
parameters.description: `true` to start, `false` to stop.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and is safe to use.

name: turnLeft
description: Starts or stops continuous panning to the left (west direction).

parameters.name: start
parameters.description: `true` to start, `false` to stop.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and is safe to use.

name: turnUp
description: Starts or stops continuous panning upward (toward the zenith or north celestial pole).

parameters.name: start
parameters.description: `true` to start, `false` to stop.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and is safe to use.

name: turnDown
description: Starts or stops continuous panning downward (toward the nadir or south celestial pole).

parameters.name: start
parameters.description: `true` to start, `false` to stop.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and is safe to use.

name: moveSlow
description:
⚠️ **WARNING:** This is a `public` method, not a `slot`. It may not work reliably in scripts.

Enables or disables slow movement mode (reduces movement speed to 20%).

parameters.name: slow
parameters.description: `true` for slow movement, `false` for normal speed.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public` method. Its reliability in scripts is not guaranteed.

example:
// May not work reliably:
// StelMovementMgr.moveSlow(true);

name: lookEast
description: Instantly points the view toward the eastern horizon.

parameters.name: zero
parameters.description: `true` to center exactly on the horizon, `false` to keep the current altitude.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and is safe to use.

name: lookWest
description: Instantly points the view toward the western horizon.

parameters.name: zero
parameters.description: `true` to center exactly on the horizon, `false` to keep the current altitude.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and is safe to use.

example: StelMovementMgr.lookWest(true);

name: lookNorth
description: Instantly points the view toward the northern horizon.

parameters.name: zero
parameters.description: `true` to center exactly on the horizon, `false` to keep the current altitude.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and is safe to use.

example: StelMovementMgr.lookNorth(true);

name: lookSouth
description: Instantly points the view toward the southern horizon.

parameters.name: zero
parameters.description: `true` to center exactly on the horizon, `false` to keep the current altitude.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and is safe to use.

example: StelMovementMgr.lookSouth(true);

name: lookZenith
description: Instantly points the view straight up (zenith).

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and is safe to use.

example:
// Look directly overhead
StelMovementMgr.lookZenith();

name: lookNadir
description: Instantly points the view straight down (nadir).

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and is safe to use.

example:
// Look directly down
StelMovementMgr.lookNadir();

name: lookTowardsNCP
description: Instantly points the view toward the North Celestial Pole.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and is safe to use.

example:
// Look at the Polaris region
StelMovementMgr.lookTowardsNCP();

name: lookTowardsSCP
description: Instantly points the view toward the South Celestial Pole.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and is safe to use.

example: StelMovementMgr.lookTowardsSCP();

name: deselection
description: Deselects the currently selected object.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and is safe to use.

example:
// Clear the current selection
StelMovementMgr.deselection();

name: reSelectLastObject
description: Re-selects the last object that was selected.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and is safe to use.

example:
// Re-select the previously selected object
StelMovementMgr.reSelectLastObject();

name: moveViewport
signature: moveViewport(double offsetX, double offsetY, float duration)
description: Animates the viewport offset, allowing the view center to be shifted. Useful for planetarium domes or panoramic displays.

parameters.name: offsetX
parameters.description: Horizontal offset percentage (-50 to 50).

parameters.name: offsetY
parameters.description: Vertical offset percentage (-50 to 50).

parameters.name: duration
parameters.description: Animation duration in seconds. Use `0` for an instant change.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and is safe to use.

name: setViewportHorizontalOffsetTarget
description: Sets the target horizontal viewport offset percentage instantly (no animation).

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Horizontal offset percentage (-50 to 50).

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and is safe to use.

example: StelMovementMgr.setViewportHorizontalOffsetTarget(10);

name: setViewportVerticalOffsetTarget
description: Sets the target vertical viewport offset percentage instantly (no animation).

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Vertical offset percentage (-50 to 50).

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and is safe to use.

example: StelMovementMgr.setViewportVerticalOffsetTarget(-15);

name: setViewDirectionJ2000
description:
⚠️ **WARNING:** This is a `public` method, not a `slot`. It may not work reliably in scripts.

Sets the view direction to a specific J2000 equatorial coordinate.

parameters.name: direction
parameters.description: View direction vector in J2000 coordinates.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public` method. Its reliability in scripts is not guaranteed.

name: setViewUpVector
description:
⚠️ **WARNING:** This is a `public` method, not a `slot`. It may not work reliably in scripts.

Sets the up vector in the current mount frame coordinates.

parameters.name: up
parameters.description: Up vector in the current mount frame.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public` method. Its reliability in scripts is not guaranteed.

name: smoothPan
signature: smoothPan(double deltaX, double deltaY, double duration, bool enable)
description: Starts or stops smooth panning by a predetermined amount over a specified duration.

parameters.name: deltaX
parameters.description: Horizontal pan amount in degrees.

parameters.name: deltaY
parameters.description: Vertical pan amount in degrees.

parameters.name: duration
parameters.description: Duration for the pan in seconds.

parameters.name: enable
parameters.description: `true` to start panning, `false` to stop.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and is safe to use.

example:
// Smoothly pan 30 degrees to the right over 2 seconds
StelMovementMgr.smoothPan(30, 0, 2.0, true);

name: setInhibitAllAutomoves
description: Inhibits all automatic movements (tracking, auto-centering, etc.). Useful for planetarium setups where manual control should be absolute.

parameters.name: inhibit
parameters.description: `true` to inhibit all automoves, `false` to allow.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and is safe to use.
